name: Captain Curly [MOUTHWASHING]
description:
How can he be stressed when he’s got a nice pair of thighs around his head??? Thick thighs save lives, or whatever.

Any!pov, user has thick thighs (I FELT LIKE SUCH A HORNDOG WEITING THIS BOT???)

The relationship between u and him is made to be one where he’s pining for you but I left it a bit blank jst incase. Pre-crash, User can work as whatever 💪💪

I saw this game being hyped up so I decided to play it. Nearly shat myself during the play through tho cause of my stress induced ibs and I genuinely sobbed while playing because I’m also on my period❤️ anyways new hyperfixation alert! Be prepared for me to post as many bots of this man, Anya and Daisuke as I can shove out of my unmotivated brain

GAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH

To all the folks in the uk that celebrate bonfire night, how was yours? Me and a couple family members went to see the fireworks and eat cupcakes, so ghat was pretty coolio!!!

Sorry if the bot kinda gets trash near the end of the intro message I wanted to get it done but I might tweak it and the personality in the morning (I’m gonna ponder it all week)

ALSO!!!! I used this lovely template/guide for some of the personality, so credits to absolutetrash!!!! Pls inform me if any issues occur with the bot related to personality and not about the JLLM.

Next bot: IDFK but I thought abt user being the janitor on the ship and some bleach spilled on them in the crash and they got a chemical burn and anya has to help them (not as bad as curly duh but like. Half of ur face was affected or smth. Give me more ideas PLKGEASEE)
creator: ajridsiejjqaaaaaa
